title: 「Everywhere / Anywhere / Somewhere + 形容詞」句型
titleEn: Using everywhere, anywhere and somewhere with adjectives

source.file: Sentence Structure 51 - 「Everywhere _ Anywhere _ Somewhere + 形容詞」句.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + verb + somewhere / anywhere + adjective + other information

formulas.labelEn: A. An unspecified or unrestricted place
formulas.labelZh: A. 描述一個不確定或不限地點
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + somewhere / anywhere + adjective + other information

formulas.labelEn: B. The condition in all places
formulas.labelZh: B. 描述所有地方的情況

formulas.labelEn: C. Every suitable or possible place
formulas.labelZh: C. 在所有合適或可行的地方
formulas.formula: Subject + verb + everywhere + possible / necessary / accessible / appropriate

example: We need somewhere quiet to talk.
exampleZh: 我們需要找個安靜的地方談話。

examples.en: We need somewhere quiet to talk.
examples.zh: 我們需要找個安靜的地方談話。
我們搜尋了所有可能的地方。

meaning.zh: 這個句型可描述某個地方、任何地方或所有地方，並把形容詞放在適當位置補充該地方的特點。

rules.en: The adjective normally follows somewhere or anywhere.
rules.zh: 形容詞通常放在 somewhere 或 anywhere 後面。

rules.en: Somewhere usually appears in affirmative statements and means one existing but unspecified place.
rules.zh: Somewhere 通常用於肯定句，表示一個存在但沒有清楚指出的地方。
examples: She wants to live somewhere peaceful.

rules.en: Anywhere is common in questions, negatives, conditions and statements without a place restriction.
rules.zh: Anywhere 常見於疑問句、否定句、條件句和表示沒有地點限制的句子。
examples: Is there anywhere safe to park?

rules.en: Everywhere means all places or in every place.
rules.zh: Everywhere 表示「所有地方」或「到處」。

rules.en: Direct adjective use after everywhere is limited; use everywhere + be/linking verb for ordinary adjectives.
rules.zh: Everywhere 直接接形容詞時，用法較有限；一般形容詞通常使用 everywhere + be／連綴動詞 + 形容詞。

rules.en: Use not anywhere to mean no place; not somewhere normally means not in one particular place.
rules.zh: 表示「沒有任何地方」時，使用 not anywhere；not somewhere 通常只表示「不是在某一個特定地方」。
examples: We could not find anywhere suitable.

benefits.en: It helps you describe a place without naming it.
benefits.zh: 即使不知道確實地點名稱或位置，仍然可以描述該地方。

benefits.en: It makes a long description shorter.
benefits.zh: 不用反覆使用 a place that is...，可直接把形容詞放在 somewhere 或 anywhere 後面。

benefits.en: It shows clearly how many places are included.
benefits.zh: Somewhere、anywhere 和 everywhere 能清楚表示某一個、任何或所有地方。
可避免反覆使用 place，使說話和寫作更自然。

benefits.en: It is useful when making plans or asking questions.
benefits.zh: 適合商量見面、溫習、吃飯、休息、泊車或舉行活動的地點。

benefits.en: It gives you a useful speaking frame.
benefits.zh: 記住 somewhere quiet 或 anywhere convenient 等框架後，可以迅速換入不同形容詞。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using somewhere, anywhere or everywhere with an adjective.
Preserve the original meaning and tense.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 somewhere、anywhere 或 everywhere 配合形容詞改寫以下句子。
答案須保留原句的意思和時態。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I need a quiet place to study.
questions.promptZh: 我需要一個安靜的地方溫習。
questions.answer: I need somewhere quiet to study.
questions.answerZh: 我需要找個安靜的地方溫習。
questions.highlight: I need somewhere quiet to study.

questions.prompt: Mia wants to sit in a warm place.
questions.promptZh: 米婭想坐在一個溫暖的地方。
questions.answer: Mia wants to sit somewhere warm.
questions.answerZh: 米婭想找個溫暖的地方坐下。
questions.highlight: Mia wants to sit somewhere warm.

questions.prompt: We found a safe place for the bags.
questions.promptZh: 我們找到一個安全的地方擺放袋子。

questions.answerZh: 我們找到一處安全的地方擺放袋子。

questions.answer: Is there anywhere cheap to eat nearby?

questions.answer: She would like to live somewhere peaceful.

questions.highlight: She would like to live somewhere peaceful.

questions.prompt: We could not find a comfortable place to rest.
